title: Vergil Wither Storm Music
description: Replaces the Wither Storm Music with Bury the Light from Devil May Cry 5!
body: Have you ever wanted the [Wither Storm](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) to be the storm that is approaching? Well now you can! With this all new resource pack, it's as easy and dragging it into your resource pack folder and BOOM! The Wither Storm now has [Bury the Light from Devil May Cry 5](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g_93xQfRjEI) as it's theme! It's also compatiable with the [V-Sides Soundtrack](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod-v-sides-soundtrack) mod, replacing the Phase 4-5 music "Deity of Destruction"!
